authors.author: Judy Bailey
Judy Bailey
Ja, es ist wahr (Jesus, du kommst zu allererst)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Yes, I believe You're the Christ my authority And yes, I believe that You are Lord No others gods- You will be my priority The one that I am fixed upon

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus, Jesus, yes I will follow Jesus, Jesus in all I do Jesus, Jesus help me remember That first of all comes You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Yes, every choice, ervery step will be led by You And yes, I will dare to live my faith I'II think of You, ask myself what would Jesus do My pride should never take Your place
